title: holy fin crap
wikitext:
[]: holy f***in' crap!!!             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Fri Jan 06, 2006 3:45 am i nearly pissed my pants reading this ; it's the evangelion platinum complete collection thing that answerman had in his caption contest for a little while. and guess what? yours truly won. (my last name is actually "myers", but tons of people i know make that mistake.) although i already have the entire platinum edition from the individual volumes, this still rocks the casbah. i swear on the bible and my game boy advance sp that i am not making this up. it's not that funny--i'm my own worst critic--but i couldn't resist making a reference to the reese's "there's no wrong way to eat a reese's" ads. one of the additional entries i submitted, which i think was a tad funnier, was this: NARRATION: It was at this time that EVA-01 began to ponder exactly how many licks it would take to get to the Tootsie Roll center of a Tootsie Pop. ah well! *pops champagne*

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Fri Jan 06, 2006 7:55 am Congrats! Now I just need those skillz, the luck and the chance and I will still fail to win anything. Damn you Oregon State Lottery, damn you! Anywho, enjoy teh Platinum Edition Complete Edition!

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Fri Jan 06, 2006 9:00 am Eternal Yamcha wrote: Anywho, enjoy teh Platinum Edition Complete Edition!

[]:             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Fri Jan 06, 2006 2:40 pm *scowls* You're a lucky bastard, you know that. I'm from N.I and it said that anybody outside the US can't enter the competition. :x But anyway, it's great that someone from this board won it, so I guess that's a plus. Hope your enjoy them. :)
